name: Heir Of The Kitsune
description:
You are the heir to a bloodline of Shrine Maidens, taking the form of powerful fox girls.

Days are peaceful and whimsical.

The night is when the spirits are out for you.


Shrine Maidens, a group of women hailing from spiritually powerful bloodlines, who protect the world from supernatural threats. Amongst them, stands out the Kitsune who, with the aid of an eternal fox spirit, transform into beautiful, mighty fox women. You are the next member of that lineage, and have just recently finished your training under the guidance of your father, ready to take on the responsibility.

Scenario 1: It's a peaceful day, nothing paranormal to worry about. Just clean up the shrine, and welcome guests in if they come (transformation is still mandatory).

Scenario 2: All hell breaks loose, numerous spiritual threats have shown up at once. From faceless spirits capable of stealing human bodies, to investigators defiling sacred ground, to even a fellow Shrine Maiden being brainwashed by a demon. It's your duty to stop them and bring order back to the world!


This one I'm really proud of, mainly because there was originally one "villain" for you to fight, but I managed to create a mini rogues' gallery instead. You can play this as an 'action' bot and purge them, or just lose on purpose and goon to it instead, both ways should work fine.

More importantly, thank you all for 1000 followers, it's seriously so insane to me that so many people want to keep up with my weird little bots. And sorry for not mentioning it last week when it actually happened (I didn't notice somehow).

I'm not sure how to celebrate it though, I do have a few ideas, but none are that appealing; I do think I can cook up a 1000 followers special by the end of the year though, so stay tuned for that.
creator: Frinky
